location: A rare drop from scythe-wielding Lesser Cleanrot Knights (not the sword-wielders). Best-known farm spot is just south of the Heart of Aeonia grace in Caelid; the same enemy type also appears later in Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree.
region: Caelid (early/mid-game farm) or Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree (late-game alternative)
tactics: Rest at Heart of Aeonia grace, face west, and wait 8-10 seconds for a scythe-wielding Lesser Cleanrot Knight to patrol by
Only the scythe-wielders drop it — the nearby sword-wielding Cleanrot Knights do not, so target carefully
Kill, return to grace, repeat (~2% base drop chance) — a well-known grace-reset farm loop
Boost Discovery (Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot, Arcane, discovery talismans) to cut down the grind
lore: A war-scythe once carried by commanders in Malenia's Cleanrot army, its half-halo blade echoing the shape of Miquella's Great Rune and dealing holy damage in her honor.

builds.name: Dex/Faith hybrid
builds.why: Scaling leans Dexterity first with a real secondary Faith investment worth building around for its Faith-scaling holy skill, Miquella's Ring of Light
